name: What An Annoying Neighbour!
overview: Tetangga Masa Gitu? is a sitcom genre soap opera that airs on NET. Starring Dwi Sasono, Sophia Latjuba, Deva Mahenra, and Chelsea Islan, this series shows the daily lives of two married couples who live next door. The first couple has been married for about 10 years, while the second couple has only been married for 8 days. This series was nominated twice at the Asian Television Awards in the Best Comedy Program category.
